title: Nursery Rhyme. DXVI. Natural History.
content:
The cock doth crow,
        To let you know,
        If you be wise,
        'Tis time to rise.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DXVI. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
